subject: Local recording conversion stuck at 0%
description: Meeting recorded to disk; double-click recording shows converting progress never advances.

ts_steps.title: Disk space
ts_steps.action: Ensure drive with recordings has free space ≥ 2× recording size.

ts_steps.title: Run as admin once
ts_steps.action: Quit Zoom; launch Zoom as administrator; open Recording tab and convert again.

ts_steps.title: Manual merge
ts_steps.action: If double_click_to_convert files exist, use Zoom's documented zTscoder or support for broken recording recovery.

internal_information: Antivirus locking temp files, corrupt recording, or missing codec. Cloud recording alternative for critical meetings.
